brand.name: ORTAQ
brand.tagline: Become a partner in real companies.

warehouse.alt: Warehouse and logistics area, stock image

trustStrip.intro: These items describe regulatory requirements in the partnership process. ORTAQ does not process live transactions yet.
trustStrip.mkk: Under regulation, share records are held at MKK
trustStrip.escrow: During the campaign, funds are held in escrow
trustStrip.edevlet: Identity verification is done via e-Government
trustStrip.disclosure: Information memorandum and risk disclosure are read before any transaction

license.detail: Partnership transactions will run on listed crowdfunding platform infrastructure. Name and license number will be published here when agreed.

depth.label: Transparency
depth.title: Every claim has a status label
depth.intro: We do not claim what we cannot evidence. Each item shows its status.

1.title: SPK-licensed platform partnership
1.text: Retail partnership is only possible via SPK-listed platform infrastructure. Partner selection is ongoing.

2.title: Escrow account
2.text: Until the campaign completes, funds stay blocked with the escrow agent.

3.title: MKK share registry
3.text: After the capital increase, shares appear in Central Registry under your name.

hero.title: Become a partner in real companies.
hero.subtitle: A path to ownership in Turkish businesses that produce and export.
hero.body: In a live partnership, funds stay in escrow until the campaign ends. Shares open in MKK under your name. This summarizes the regulatory process; ORTAQ does not process transactions yet.
hero.note: Partnership is an investment decision. Returns are not guaranteed.

visual.scene: Businesses connected to the real economy

template.label: Campaign page
template.title: This is what a campaign page looks like
template.intro: The fields below are a sample template. We do not use invented company names, numbers, or stories. Live campaigns pull from the information memorandum.
template.imageCaption: Live campaign images come from the company; field review is done within the partner platform framework

company.label: Company
company.placeholder: Trade name appears in the information memorandum

location.label: Location
location.placeholder: Production or head office address from the information memorandum

activity.label: What they do
activity.placeholder: Sector and activity in plain language

useOfFunds.label: Use of funds
useOfFunds.placeholder: Capital increase use plan, item by item

template.footerNote: When live, PDF information memorandum, committee report, and risk summary appear on this page.

companyPage.title: Sample campaign page
companyPage.intro: This page shows structure only. No real company name, amounts, or performance data.

memorandum.title: Information memorandum
memorandum.text: Live campaigns publish the SPK-compliant PDF here. Only field structure is shown now.

committee.title: Committee review
committee.text: Investment committee report is shared with the campaign via the partner platform.

risk.title: Risk summary
risk.text: Each campaign has specific risks in the memorandum. Read the general risks page separately.

companyPage.footerNote: Live campaigns open on the partner platform. ORTAQ provides the interface; it does not guarantee company performance.

onboarding.title: Read first
onboarding.intro: Partnership is a serious decision. No rush here. You do not have to continue if something is unclear.

reassurance.banner: No signup. No payment. You can leave anytime.
reassurance.noRush: No need to rush. Questions: destek@ortaq.biz

safety.label: Start
safety.title: What is this page?
safety.text: Before partnership, we explain the process and risks in plain language. The decision is yours.

points.1: No identity verification or payment here.
points.3: You do not have to continue without understanding.

about.label: ORTAQ
about.title: What ORTAQ is and is not
about.is: ORTAQ is an interface that explains equity crowdfunding in plain language. For people who want partnership in real companies.
about.isNot: ORTAQ is not a bank, not an adviser, and does not promise returns. Decision and risk are yours.

money.label: Money
money.title: Where does your money go?
money.intro: The most common question. In short:

1.title: When you join
1.text: Funds go to an escrow account. Not to the company.

2.title: During the campaign
2.text: Funds stay blocked. The company cannot use them.

3.title: When the campaign ends
3.text: If the target is met, capital increase proceeds. If not, refund process applies.

4.title: After that
4.text: Shares are registered at MKK in your name.

money.note: ORTAQ does not hold funds. Escrow is set up within the licensed platform framework.

risk.label: Risks
risk.title: Know the risks
risk.intro: You can lose money in partnership. We do not hide that.
risk.ack: I have read the risk items. I know I may lose everything, cannot withdraw quickly, and annual limits apply.

process.label: Process
process.title: What comes next?
process.intro: If a platform agreement is in place, the flow is roughly:

wait.label: For now
wait.title: No transactions yet
wait.text: ORTAQ does not process transactions yet. You are here to read. That is normal.
wait.emptyText: When the licensed platform agreement is final, you will continue from here. Reading is enough for now.
wait.partnerNote: Platform agreement not yet in place
wait.delay: If there is a delay, we will say so on this page. Nothing opens silently.

risk.label: Know this first
risk.title: Every partnership carries risk
risk.intro: ORTAQ aims to align the process with regulation; it does not remove risk.

items.1: You may lose your entire contribution.
items.2: Money does not return quickly; exit can take years.
items.3: The company may miss or delay targets.
items.4: Annual participation limits apply. Amounts are in the information memorandum and regulation.
items.5: ORTAQ does not give investment advice. The decision is yours.

risk.cooling: Legal cooling-off applies during the campaign. Terms are in the information memorandum.
risk.preface: A short list to read before deciding.

process.label: Process
process.title: What happens start to finish
process.intro: The general flow of the partnership process. Steps reflect the SPK sequence.

1.title: Sign up
1.text: e-Government identity verification. Read and acknowledge risk disclosure.

2.title: Review the company
2.text: Information memorandum, use of funds, committee report.

3.title: Join the campaign
3.text: Funds go to escrow and are blocked.

4.title: Capital increase
4.text: If target is met, the company completes the capital increase.

5.title: Share registry
5.text: Shares open at MKK in your name. Updates via the platform.

cta.title: Understand first, decide later.
cta.text: Partnership is not rushed. Reading takes minutes; your decision may be long-term.

footer.tagline: An interface that simplifies partnership in real businesses.
footer.regulatory: Under the Equity Crowdfunding Communiqué: annual limits, mandatory information memorandum, risk disclosure, and cooling-off rights apply.
footer.notAdvice: ORTAQ does not give investment advice. Content is for information only.
footer.dispute: Complaints are taken in writing and reviewed with the partner platform.
footer.entityNote: Legal entity, trade registry, and MERSIS details will be published here when complete.

trustPage.title: Trust and transparency
trustPage.subtitle: Process, documents, and written communication. We do not show unproven claims.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure status
infrastructure.intro: Each item shows its current status label.

1.title: Platform partner
1.text: Talks with an SPK-listed crowdfunding platform are ongoing. Name and license number will appear here.

2.title: Escrow agent
2.text: Escrow structure will be defined with the partner platform per regulation.

3.title: MKK integration
3.text: After partnership completes, share records are held at MKK in the participant's name.

1.title: Legal framework
1.text: Equity partnership runs under SPK regulation.

2.title: Fund protection
2.text: Funds stay blocked in escrow until the campaign ends.

3.title: Share registry
3.text: Partnership rights are recorded at MKK.

4.title: Human review
4.text: Projects are reviewed by the investment committee.

5.title: Open communication
5.text: Delays and bad news are not hidden.

committee.title: Investment committee
committee.intro: Roles are assigned within the partner platform framework. Names announced after agreement.

3.desc: Trade registry, SPK compliance, memorandum integrity.

committee.note: Names and bios published together with the platform partner.

contact.title: General contact
contact.text: Email destek@ortaq.biz. Office hours and response times will be stated here during live campaigns.

dispute.title: Complaints
dispute.text: Disputes are recorded. ORTAQ and the partner platform respond together.

response.title: Response times
response.text: Written requests are logged. Response time depends on the case; we notify you if delayed.

riskPage.title: Risks and limits
riskPage.subtitle: Read before deciding on partnership.
riskPage.notAdvice: This page is not investment advice.

1.title: Principal risk
1.text: You may lose everything. No return guarantee.

2.title: Liquidity
2.text: You may not sell when you want. Exit can take years.

3.title: Retail limits
3.text: Non-qualified individuals face annual limits per regulation.

4.title: Cooling-off
4.text: Legal cooling-off during the campaign per information memorandum.

5.title: Tax
5.text: Partnership may create tax obligations. Consult your accountant.

6.title: Company risk
6.text: The company may fail, miss targets, or change management.

7.title: Platform role
7.text: ORTAQ provides an interface; it does not guarantee company performance.

help.title: Questions
help.text: If unsure, write us or consult an independent adviser before deciding.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.p1: ORTAQ processes personal data under Turkish KVKK.
privacy.p2: e-Government verification uses data only for verification.
privacy.p3: Full text published after legal review before platform partnership goes live.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.p1: ORTAQ does not give investment advice.
terms.p2: Partnership will run on SPK-licensed crowdfunding platform infrastructure.
terms.p3: Full terms published before platform partnership.
